review_text: Outstanding restaurant! The food was incredible and the service was top-notch. I highly recommend the pad thai and green curry.
Great atmosphere and delicious food. The staff was friendly and accommodating. Will definitely come back!
Food was okay but service was slow. Had to wait 45 minutes for our order. The tom yum was too salty.
Authentic Thai flavors! Love the mango sticky rice dessert. Great value for money.
Average experience. Food was decent but nothing special. Location is convenient though.
Good food and reasonable prices. The restaurant could use better lighting, but overall a pleasant dining experience.
Terrible experience. Food was cold and the chicken was undercooked. Will not return.
Amazing! Best Thai food in the city!
